title: Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Ep1VDcover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode I
The Visual Dictionary'' |author=[[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]] |release date=[[September 15]], [[1999]]{{DK|subdomain=us|url=nf/Book/BookDisplay/0,,11_0789447010,00.html|text=Star Wars Episode 1: Visual Dictionary|nolive=1}} |type=Hardcover |pages= |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0789447010 |series=''[[Star Wars Visual Dictionaries]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary''''' is the second book in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Visual Dictionaries|Visual Dictionary]] series. It describes and exhibits the elements of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. It was incorporated into the ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'' in [[2006]], and a modified version, ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'', was published in [[2012]]. ==Contents== *[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] *[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] *[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] *[[Jedi Council/Legends|The Jedi High Council]] *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *The [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] *The Invasion Force *[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|Battle Droids]] *[[Droideka/Legends|Droidekas]] *Queen [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] *The Queen's [[Handmaiden/Legends|Handmaidens]] *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Naberrie]] *[[Naboo (people)/Legends|The Naboo]] *Captain [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Panaka]] *Naboo Pilots *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] *The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] *Gungan Warfare *Sea Monsters of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] *[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Watto/Legends|Watto]] *[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] *[[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] Crews *The [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] Crowd *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] Inhabitants *Chancellor [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Valorum]] *Senator [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *[[Galactic Senate/Legends|The Senate]] *Acknowledgments ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Ep1VDcover.jpg|Cover File:Ep1VDcover_Pl.jpg|Polish - ''Część I: Słownik Obrazkowy'' File:Episode_I_Visual_Distionary_RU.jpg|Russian - ''Иллюстрированный словарь.
